diagrams.title: Energy Transformation Flowchart - Thermal Power Plant
diagrams.description: Shows energy conversions from fuel chemical energy to electrical energy with efficiency at each stage
elements: Fuel (Chemical Energy) → Boiler (Thermal Energy, 90% efficient) → Turbine (Mechanical Energy, 40% efficient) → Generator (Electrical Energy, 98% efficient) → Grid Transmission (95% efficient)
diagrams.purpose: Understand energy losses and efficiency calculation in conventional power generation

diagrams.title: Kinetic vs Potential Energy in Pendulum
diagrams.description: A pendulum bob at different positions showing conversion between KE and PE
diagrams.purpose: Visualize conservation of mechanical energy and energy transformation principles

diagrams.title: Energy Classification Chart
diagrams.description: Classification of energy sources into renewable vs non-renewable and conventional vs non-conventional
elements: Renewable: Solar, Wind, Hydro, Geothermal, Biomass
Non-Renewable: Coal, Petroleum, Natural Gas, Nuclear (Uranium)
diagrams.purpose: Understand different categories of energy sources and their characteristics
